mapper.select: SELECT C.CNSLT_ID, C.CNSLT_SJ, C.CNSLT_CN, C.OTHBC_AT, C.WRITNG_PASSWORD, C.AREA_NO, C.MIDDLE_TELNO, C.END_TELNO, C.FRST_MBTLNUM, C.MIDDLE_MBTLNUM, C.END_MBTLNUM, C.EMAIL_ADRES, C.EMAIL_ANSWER_AT, C.MBER_NM , C.WRITNG_DE, C.RDCNT, C.CATEGORY_ID, D.CODE_NM CATEGORY_ID_NM, C.MANAGT_CN,C.MANAGT_DE , C.ATCH_FILE_ID, A.USER_NM, A.OFFM_TELNO, A.EMAIL_ADRES AEMAIL_ADRES, B.ORGNZT_NM , DATE_FORMAT(C.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , C.FRST_REGISTER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(C.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , C.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM COMTNEXPENSEMANAGE C LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE_ID ='COM028' AND C.CATEGORY_ID = D.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTNEMPLYRINFO A ON A.ESNTL_ID= C.LAST_UPDUSR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTNORGNZTINFO B ON A.ORGNZT_ID = B.ORGNZT_ID WHERE CNSLT_ID=#{expenseId}

SELECT C.EXPENSE_ID, C.MBER_ID, C.CATEGORY_ID, C.EXPENSE_DT, C.EXPENSE_TM, C.AMOUNT, C.EXPENSE_NOTE, DATE_FORMAT(C.EXPENSE_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') EXPENSE_DT, DATE_FORMAT(C.CREAT_DT,'%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(C.UPDT_DT,'%Y-%m-%d'), C.CATEGORY_ID, D.CODE_NM CATEGORY_NM, A.USER_NM AS MBER_NM, A.OFFM_TELNO, A.EMAIL_ADRES AEMAIL_ADRES, B.ORGNZT_NM FROM COMTNEXPENSEMANAGE C LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE_ID ='COM087' AND C.CATEGORY_ID = D.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTNEMPLYRINFO A ON A.ESNTL_ID= C.MBER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTNORGNZTINFO B ON A.ORGNZT_ID = B.ORGNZT_ID WHERE 1=1
AND MBER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryNm}, '%')
ORDER BY CODE_NM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM COMTNEXPENSEMANAGE WHERE 1=1
AND MBER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND CNSLT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT C.CNSLT_ID, C.CNSLT_SJ, C.CNSLT_CN, C.OTHBC_AT, C.WRITNG_PASSWORD, C.AREA_NO, C.MIDDLE_TELNO, C.END_TELNO, C.FRST_MBTLNUM, C.MIDDLE_MBTLNUM, C.END_MBTLNUM, C.EMAIL_ADRES, C.EMAIL_ANSWER_AT, C.MBER_NM , C.WRITNG_DE, C.RDCNT, C.CATEGORY_ID, D.CODE_NM CATEGORY_ID_NM, C.MANAGT_CN, C.MANAGT_DE, C.ATCH_FILE_ID, A.USER_NM, A.OFFM_TELNO, A.EMAIL_ADRES AEMAIL_ADRES, B.ORGNZT_NM , DATE_FORMAT(C.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , C.FRST_REGISTER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(C.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , C.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM COMTNEXPENSEMANAGE C LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE_ID ='COM028' AND C.CATEGORY_ID = D.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTNEMPLYRINFO A ON A.ESNTL_ID= C.LAST_UPDUSR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTNORGNZTINFO B ON A.ORGNZT_ID = B.ORGNZT_ID WHERE CNSLT_ID=#{expenseId}

SELECT CNSLT_ID, CNSLT_SJ, CNSLT_CN, OTHBC_AT, WRITNG_PASSWORD, AREA_NO, MIDDLE_TELNO, END_TELNO, FRST_MBTLNUM, MIDDLE_MBTLNUM, END_MBTLNUM, EMAIL_ADRES, EMAIL_ANSWER_AT, MBER_NM , WRITNG_DE, RDCNT INQIRE_CO, CATEGORY_ID, CATEGORY_ID_NM, MANAGT_CN, MANAGT_DE, ATCH_FILE_ID, USER_NM, OFFM_TELNO, EMAIL_ADRES AEMAIL_ADRES, ORGNZT_NM , FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM,CNS.* FROM ( SELECT C.CNSLT_ID, C.CNSLT_SJ, C.CNSLT_CN, C.OTHBC_AT, C.WRITNG_PASSWORD, C.AREA_NO, C.MIDDLE_TELNO, C.END_TELNO, C.FRST_MBTLNUM, C.MIDDLE_MBTLNUM, C.END_MBTLNUM, C.EMAIL_ADRES, C.EMAIL_ANSWER_AT, C.MBER_NM , C.WRITNG_DE, C.RDCNT, C.CATEGORY_ID, D.CODE_NM CATEGORY_ID_NM, C.MANAGT_CN, C.MANAGT_DE, C.ATCH_FILE_ID, A.USER_NM, A.OFFM_TELNO, A.EMAIL_ADRES AEMAIL_ADRES, B.ORGNZT_NM , C.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , C.FRST_REGISTER_ID, C.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , C.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM COMTNEXPENSEMANAGE C LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE_ID ='COM028' AND C.CATEGORY_ID = D.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTNEMPLYRINFO A ON A.ESNTL_ID= C.LAST_UPDUSR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTNORGNZTINFO B ON A.ORGNZT_ID = B.ORGNZT_ID WHERE 1=1
AND MBER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND CATEGORY_ID_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY CNSLT_SJ DESC ) CNS ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{recordCountPerPage} and RNUM > #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM COMTNEXPENSEMANAGE WHERE 1=1
AND MBER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND CATEGORY_ID_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
